zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Maurice Berkeley於大約1298年出生在英國肯特貝克萊時，他的父親Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley28歲，母親Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley24歲。他於大約1320年與Margaret De Mortimer在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他去世於1346年2月12日在法國阿奎泰道多卡拉斯享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Maurice Berkeley was born about 1298, in Berkeley, Kent, England, his father, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, was 28 and his mother, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, was 24. He married Margaret De Mortimer about 1320, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 12 February 1346, in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Maurice Berkeley est né environ 1298, à Berkeley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Mortimer environ 1320, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 12 février 1346, à Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1320 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Margaret De Mortimer geheiratet. Er starb am 12. Lui sposato Margaret De Mortimer circa 1320, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Berkeleyが約1298年にイギリスケントバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeleyは28歳，母Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeleyは24歳であった。約1320年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでMargaret De Mortimerと結婚した。彼は1346年2月12日にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンカレイスで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Berkeley(이)가 대략 1298년 영국 켄트 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Margaret De Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1346년 2월 12일 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 캘레이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1298, em Berkeley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Mortimer aproximadamente 1320, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1346, em Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucester Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Maurice Berkeley родился около 1298 г. в местности биркели, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Mortimer около 1320 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 12 февраля 1346 г. в местности калеи, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестир кэтедраль, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret De Mortimer aproximadamente 1320, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
